sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports shortness of breath and chest pain. The patient denies other symptoms. He reports knee surgery a couple months ago and felt no problem in rehab and recovery. The patient performed yard work this weekend and experienced heat.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are concerning for possible cardiac ischemia. The history of knee surgery is relevant to current symptoms.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor will order a cardiac catheterization. The doctor will prescribe carvedilol. The doctor will prescribe lisinopril. Follow up in one week to assess response to medications and catheterization.
